author: Clément Vannicatte
subject: feat(reverseHighlight/reverseSnippet): Implements reverseHighlight and reverseSnippet (#4592)
body:
* Implement reverseHighlight helper and function

* Implement reverseSnippet helper and function

* Implement concatHighlightedParts, getHighlightFromSiblings, getHighlightedParts, reverseHighlightedParts and unescape functions in utils

* Increase bundle size limit from 65.25KB to 65.5KB

Co-authored-by: Haroen Viaene <hello@haroen.me>
